parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  p.*,
  l.email as client_email,
  l.first_name as client_first_name,
  l.last_name as client_last_name,
  l.company as client_company
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN leads l ON p.lead_id = l.id
WHERE p.id = {{ $json.project_id }} AND p.status = 'completed';

=UPDATE completed_projects SET
  case_study_url = '{{ $('Code: Generate Case Study Content').item.json.portfolio_url }}',
  published_to_portfolio = true,
  portfolio_published_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Code: Generate Case Study Content').item.json.project_id }};

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "project_name": "{{ $('Code: Generate Case Study Content').item.json.project_name }}",
  "portfolio_url": "{{ $('Code: Generate Case Study Content').item.json.portfolio_url }}",
  "slug": "{{ $('Code: Generate Case Study Content').item.json.slug }}",
  "deployment_triggered": true,
  "client_notified": true
}
